channel.title: Countertops on Kitchen Remodel Ideas
channel.description: Recent content in Countertops on Kitchen Remodel Ideas

item.title: Countertops vs. Backsplash
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Your kitchen wouldn’t be complete without countertops and wall tiles. When arranging the design elements and architectural features, the colors don’t have to match, but they ought to be balanced. Complimentary Color Theme You’re not going to love your kitchen backsplash tiles if they do not suit the color of your countertops. Ideally, colors complement, harmonize, and enhance cohesion across the room’s visual plane. Contrasting Color Theme Use backsplash tiles with colors that visually clash against your countertops.
